name: truecopy-mcp-image
description: Dependency set for the truecopy-mcp container image (Dockerfile). Not published; exists so the image installs from a hash-pinned lockfile via `npm ci` instead of an unpinned `npm i <pkg>@<version>`.

comments.overrides: GHSA-frvp-7c67-39w9 — path traversal in @hono/node-server's serve-static. It reaches this image transitively (server-everything -> @modelcontextprotocol/sdk -> @hono/node-server ^1.19.9), and the SDK's caret range cannot resolve to the patched 2.0.5, so there is no upstream fix to wait for yet. Drop this override once the SDK widens its range; Dependabot watches /docker and will offer that bump.
